data.current_description: Post a comment to the discussion stream on a specific page.
data.description_suggestion: Posts a comment to the activity stream or discussion on a specific page. Requires the page ID and comment content via FeedPostRequest. The operation creates a new feed post entry visible to page members and returns the created FeedPost object with metadata including timestamp and author information. This action updates the page's activity feed and may trigger notifications to page followers.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. It doesn't specify: (1) what input is required (FeedPostRequest structure), (2) what is returned (FeedPost response), (3) side effects (activity feed updates, potential notifications), or (4) visibility/access implications. The improved description provides complete context about inputs, outputs, and side effects while maintaining domain-appropriate terminology consistent with the API's Feed tag and schema references.

data.current_description: Permanently delete a page.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete a page and all its associated content. This action cannot be undone. Requires the page_id parameter. data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Added critical information about irreversibility, what gets deleted (associated content), required parameters, return value, and side effects. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of the operation and make informed decisions about when to use it.
